image:image.image:title: Metro Industrial Park - 3D Aerial Map View, Moraiya Ahmedabad
image:image.image:caption: Aerial 3D view of Metro Industrial Park, Moraiya, Ahmedabad — 54,000 sq.yard industrial complex with 63 sheds

image:image.image:title: Modern Industrial Sheds for Sale and Lease - Moraiya Ahmedabad
image:image.image:caption: Modern industrial shed units available for sale and lease at Metro Industrial Park, Moraiya near Changodar

image:image.image:caption: Large warehouse and storage facility available for lease near Sarkhej Bavla Highway, Ahmedabad

image:image.image:caption: Main entrance gate of Metro Industrial Park, Opp. Suvas Industrial Estate, Moraiya, Changodar, Ahmedabad

image:image.image:title: 60ft Wide Internal Roads - Metro Industrial Park
image:image.image:caption: 60-foot wide internal roads inside Metro Industrial Park for heavy vehicle and logistics access

image:image.image:title: Office Space at Metro Industrial Park Ahmedabad
image:image.image:caption: Dedicated office space and administrative facilities at Metro Industrial Park

image:image.image:title: Metro Arcade Commercial Complex - Front View Ahmedabad
image:image.image:caption: Front exterior view of Metro Arcade commercial complex by Metro Enterprise, Ahmedabad

image:image.image:caption: Commercial shop units and retail spaces available for sale at Metro Arcade
